sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112606" key="fulloto/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φυλλο-τόκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n112606.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">producing leaves,</tr_> Opp.C.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0005.tlg002.perseus-grc1:1:116" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.116</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
